message:
fix: custom-registered tools appear in system prompt (GAP-9.08A)

Tools registered post-session-creation via sess.reg.Register() now
appear in an "Additional tools" section of the system prompt.
Core tools (registered during session init) are tracked via
coreToolNames to avoid duplicate listings.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
